attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who targets intermediate sprint points rather than stage wins. Shows limited ability to respond to accelerations on punchy, repeated climbs.
team_tactics: Deployed as a breakaway tool for harvesting intermediate sprint points for team leaders. Used for tactical objectives beyond personal results, then often abandons the effort.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain where breakaways can establish gaps. Struggles on circuits with repeated punchy climbs that require multiple accelerations.
vulnerability: Unable to respond when race splits occur on repeated short climbs. Lacks the explosive power needed for circuit races with multiple punchy ascents.
key_patterns: Sent into breakaways for team tactical purposes, not personal victory chances (2 instances)
Targets intermediate sprint points from breaks before dropping back to peloton (2 instances)
Cannot follow accelerations on repeated punchy climbs, loses position in selection (2 instances)
form_trajectory: unknown: limited recent data, but 2018 role appears more domestique-oriented than leadership
